title: Freelance Yoga Instructor
description:
AzureGym - 200 Bedok North Ave 1, #02-01, Singapore 469752
________________________________

About us / Who we are


We are a community-focused Muaythai and movement studio dedicated to helping students train stronger, move better, and recover smarter. Alongside Muaythai, we value mobility, flexibility, and body awareness as essential parts of long-term athletic development. We’re looking for an instructor who is passionate about movement-based classes that complement Muaythai, such as stretch, mobility, recovery, or yoga-inspired sessions.

Role Overview

We are looking for a motivated and knowledgeable instructor to lead movement classes that support Muaythai training, with an emphasis on: Mobility & joint health Flexibility & stretching Recovery & injury prevention Breathwork and body awareness (optional but valued) This role is ideal for someone who understands the physical demands of striking sports and can design classes that enhance performance, reduce injury risk, and improve longevity for practitioners.

Responsibilities

  • Plan and conduct group classes focused on stretching, mobility, recovery, or yoga-inspired movement to enhance athletic performance and injury prevention
  • Design targeted sessions that complement Muaythai training by improving mobility and strength in hips, shoulders, spine, ankles, balance, and core stability
  • Adapt class content and progressions to accommodate mixed skill levels, from beginners to experienced athletes, ensuring inclusive participation
  • Create and maintain a safe, supportive, and inclusive class environment that fosters student engagement and confidence
  • Deliver clear verbal and physical cues, provide modifications, and guide progressions to optimize participant outcomes
  • Collaborate closely with the Muaythai coach to align movement classes with overall training goals and athlete development

Required competencies and certifications (or equivalent practical experience)

  • Certification or formal training in Yoga, Mobility, Movement Coaching, Physiotherapy, Sports Science, or related fields, or equivalent practical experience
  • Demonstrated strong understanding of movement mechanics and athletic mobility relevant to combat sports and physically active individuals
  • Proven ability to teach group classes confidently with clear communication and commanding presence
  • Professionalism demonstrated through punctuality, reliability, and commitment to class quality

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience working with combat sports athletes or physically active populations to tailor movement programs effectively
  • Knowledge of mobility systems such as Controlled Articular Rotations (CARs), Proprioceptive Neuromuscular Facilitation (PNF) stretching, and joint preparation techniques
  • Experience leading recovery-focused classes aimed at injury prevention and performance longevity
  • Familiarity with breathwork techniques and nervous system regulation to enhance body awareness and recovery

What We Offer

  • A supportive, training-focused environment that encourages professional growth and innovation
  • Opportunity to shape and expand a movement program integrated with Muaythai training
  • Competitive pay per class commensurate with experience
  • Consistent class schedule with potential for program expansion

How to Apply

Please send to info@azuregym.sg

  • A short introduction about yourself
  • Relevant certifications or experience
  • Any teaching videos or social media (if available)

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
